title: GenChem Master Incident Story: Pump P-101 Bearing Degradation & Cascade Boiler Trip

timeline.event: API Plan 53B accumulator nitrogen bladder pre-charge decayed to 1.8 bar.
Vibration RMS increased from 2.8 mm/s to 6.84 mm/s over 48 hours.
Drive-end bearing race micro-pitting observed by Operator Ananya Sharma.
Control Valve V-102 experienced partial actuator diaphragm packing blockage at 48% stroke.
Hydraulic pressure surge propagated to Boiler Feed Header, causing Boiler B-201 high pressure trip.
Emergency Plant Shutdown executed under LOTO SOP-12.
ISO 55001 & OISD-137 audit finding flagged 12-day maintenance delay.
INDUSTRIAL BRAIN Multi-Agent Swarm generated Predictive Overhaul Plan ($4,200 cost vs $280,000 outage loss).
